events.name: Werder Bremen at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane bagged a record-breaking 31st league goal and Jamal Musiala added two more in the side's 5-2 demolition of hosts Darmstadt 98 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane breaks Bundesliga record in Bayern win

video.headline: Kane makes Bundesliga history as Bayern keeps up Leverkusen chase

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Kane makes Bundesliga history as Bayern keeps up Leverkusen chase) 2024/03/16 ESHEET
